subcodes.first_line: The Book revealed by the All-Merciful unto them that have attained the Kawthar of certitude on a Day whereon the foundations were shaken and rent asunder [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فاز بکوثر الایقان فی یوم فیه تزعزع البنیان و انشقت
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
